query:
INSERT INTO buyer_specs (buyerName, buyerCode, lawsuitKeys, content, notes, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  'Illinois Sexual Abuse (Youth Center)',
  'ILH',
  'Illinois Sexual Abuse (Youth Center)',
  '# Illinois Sexual Abuse Criteria at Youth/Retention Center (ILH)

## Core Eligibility

1. **Confirm PC was a patient/resident of an approved facility**
2. **Was a Minor at the time of abuse**
   - Cannot be older than 36 at time of claim; DO NOT SIGN if older than 36 (DOB must be after 1990)
   - DOB must be verified via background check, Google, or ID Proof

## Type of Abuse Required

3. **PC claims they were sexually abused by staff member OR another resident**
   - Accepted: Groping, Fondling, Penetrating, Oral, Sex of any type
   - **NOT accepted: Physical abuse only** (fighting, beatings, harassment, etc.)
   - Sexual abuse must include: oral sex, penetration of any kind (digital, vaginal, rectal), fondling UNDER the pants, or cases where staff forced one minor to engage in sex acts with another (staff-on-patient OR patient-on-patient)
   - **DO NOT SIGN "over/on top of clothing"**
   - Be mindful of groping during initial body search upon intake — some suffered digital penetration here, others may say groping only; probe further

4. **Gather details:**
   - How many instances of abuse?
   - Where did abuse occur?

## Disqualifiers

5. Any substantial mental illness diagnoses (schizophrenia, bipolar disorder, multiple personality disorder) — flag
6. PC already has an attorney for this experience — DQ
7. **No Violent Felonies** (Murder, Rape, Extreme Violence) — DQ (verify via background check, Google, or ID Proof)
8. Must have had **Illinois address** at some point (background check, Google, or ID Proof)

## Perpetrator Information

9. **MUST PROVIDE NAME AND/OR DESCRIPTION of ABUSER** (guard, therapist, night worker, etc.)

## Approved Facilities

- Streamwood Behavioral Health (Irving Park)
- Pavillion Behavioral Health (Champaign)
- Lincoln Prairie Behavioral Health (Springfield)
- Riveredge Hospital (Forest Park)

**Note:** Many clients have been to more than one facility. If they list more than one, **must confirm that the abuse they described happened at one of the approved facilities above.**',
  'Age cutoff: max 36 years old (DOB after 1990). No physical-only abuse. Must name/describe abuser. Illinois address required. No violent felonies.',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000
);

**Note:** Many clients have been to more than one facility. If they list more than one, **must confirm that the abuse they described happened at one of the approved facilities above.**',
  'Age cutoff: max 36 years old (DOB after 1990). No physical-only abuse. Must name/describe abuser. Illinois address required. No violent felonies.',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW()) * 1000
